scripts.sass:bifrost: node-sass --include-path node_modules --source-map-embed source/styles/main.scss assets/styles/bifrost.css && postcss assets/styles/bifrost.css --use autoprefixer -d assets/styles/
scripts.sass:bifrost:prod: node-sass --output-style --include-path node_modules source/styles/main.scss assets/styles/bifrost.css && postcss --no-map assets/styles/bifrost.css --use autoprefixer -d assets/styles/
